name: Christmas Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two round pans, 9 x 11 inches.
3. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on high speed until foamy. Gradually beat in 1/2 cup granulated sugar until stiff and glossy; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, sift together flour, 1 cup granulated sugar, baking powder, and salt. Add shortening and mix on medium speed. Beat in milk for 30 seconds.
5. Mix in egg whites and flaked coconut; pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely.
7. Fill cake layers with Tutti-Fruiti Filling.
8. In a chilled medium bowl, beat whipping cream, almond extract (or vanilla), and powdered sugar on high speed until light and fluffy.
9. Spread frosting on the sides and top edge of the cake within 1 inch of the edge.
10. Serve immediately or refrigerate until serving. Store covered in the refrigerator.
12 servings.
